content:
About Local 247

Allied Auto Workers Local 247 represents the men and women of the Irongate Motor Assembly Plant in Detroit. We have defended this contract since 1951.
title: About Local 247

content:
Contact the Hall

The hall is open weekdays 8am to 5pm. Steward office hours are Tuesday and Thursday evenings. Call (313) 555-2470 or stop by 2470 Michigan Avenue.
title: Contact the Hall

content:
Membership & Dues

Learn about your benefits, how dues are set, and who your steward is. New members can complete enrollment online or at the front desk.
title: Membership & Dues

content:
Your Stewards

Find your shop steward by department and shift. Stewards are your first call for grievances, safety concerns, and contract questions.
title: Your Stewards

content:
File a Grievance

Use this form to start a grievance. Note the date, the article violated, and what remedy you're seeking. Your steward will follow up within five working days.
title: File a Grievance

content:
The Contract

Download the current collective bargaining agreement and the wage and benefit schedules. Side letters and the grievance procedure are linked below.
title: The Contract

content:
Benefits & Pension

Summaries of the health plan, dental and vision, the pension, and how to reach the benefits administrator at the hall.
title: Benefits & Pension

content:
Retiree Chapter

The retiree chapter meets the third Thursday monthly. Information on retiree health, the COLA, and chapter events is posted here.
title: Retiree Chapter

content:
Health & Safety

Report a hazard, find your safety committee rep, and review the lockout and PPE procedures for the plant.
title: Health & Safety

content:
Scholarships

The members' children scholarship awards two grants each spring. Eligibility, the essay prompt, and the application form are below.
title: Scholarships

content:
Events Calendar

Membership meetings, steward training, the solidarity picnic, and the relief drive. Add events to your calendar from this page.
title: Events Calendar

content:
Organizing

Thinking about organizing your shop? Local 247 can help. Learn how a drive works and request a confidential conversation with an organizer.
title: Organizing

content:
Our History

From the 1951 charter to today, a timeline of the strikes, contracts, and members who built Local 247.
title: Our History

content:
Volunteer

The hall runs on volunteers. Sign up to help with the food pantry, the newsletter, phone banking, and event setup.
title: Volunteer

content:
Steward Resources

Forms, contract language, the grievance log, and training materials for stewards. Login required for some documents.
title: Steward Resources

content:
Pay Your Dues

Pay dues online, set up automatic deduction, or learn about hardship deferrals. Questions go to the financial secretary.
title: Pay Your Dues

content:
Newsletter Archive

Browse past issues of The 247 Reporter, our monthly newsletter, going back to 2019.
title: Newsletter Archive

content:
Know Your Rights

A member's guide to Weingarten rights, just-cause discipline, seniority, and what to do if you're called into the office.
title: Know Your Rights

content:
Bargaining Updates

The latest from the bargaining table, the proposal exchange tracker, and how to read the tentative agreement when it's posted.
title: Bargaining Updates

content:
Hardship & Relief Fund

The relief fund helps members through layoffs, illness, and emergencies. Learn who qualifies, how to apply, and how to donate.
title: Hardship & Relief Fund
